'''Peepers''' were [[Bird/Legends|birds]] found on [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]].<ref name="COTJ" /> The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kegan/Legends|Kegan]] had [[humming peeper]]s.<ref name="TFFT" />
